headline: Edison International Announces $25,000 Lineworker Scholarship Recipients
summary: ROSEMEAD, Calif., July 10, 2026--Today Edison International named 10 recipients of its 2026 Lineworker Scholarship. Each will receive up to $25,000 to pursue a career in the electric utility field. The announcement coincides with National Lineworker Appreciation Day, which honors more than 100,000 skilled technicians across the nation for their critical roles in safely maintaining and restoring the electrical grid.
